use_cases: Display loading states during data fetching or async operations
Provide visual feedback during page transitions or navigation
Indicate processing status for form submissions or API calls
Show activity during multi-step workflows or onboarding
Enhance user experience with customizable animated loaders
ai_summary: A customizable animated loader spinner featuring nested squares that scale, rotate, and blur in a synchronized animation. The component includes interactive controls for adjusting square count, animation speed, and pause/play functionality. Built with React hooks for state management and dynamically injected CSS animations for smooth performance.
